rationale: Codebase-pin lens, verified in an absolute /tmp archive of ce9f5395 (worktree left untouched, git status clean throughout). Every named symbol exists exactly as described: Refutation{Slot,Round,Reason,Evidence} + Panel.Refutations (panel.go:93-117); Result.UnresolvedVerdicts (tally.go:173) and Result.AppliedRefutations (tally.go:214); Decision.AppliedRefutations populated only on the leg-10 Allow (gate.go:56-59,293-299); panelGate now returns the 3-tuple (*panel.Registration, []panel.Refutation, error) (panel_advisory.go:160); writePanelRefutedMetadata (panel_advisory.go:474), reconcilePendingRefutations (panel_advisory.go:566), completeGetMetadataFn seam wired to bead.GetMetadata (complete.go:50); bead.MergeMetadata (bdcli.go:275) and new bead.GetMetadata (bdcli.go:313) both present. go build ./... clean; gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal empty; go vet ./internal/panel ./internal/complete ./internal/bead clean. All targeted test filters PASS: panel -run 'Refut|Round|Dup|PanelGateDecision' (incl. AC2/AC3/AC4a/AC4b/AC7/AC8/AC10 subtests, TestVoteDecision_Refutations, TestResult_AppliedRefutations); complete -run 'PanelRefuted|PanelGate' (15 TestPanelRefuted_* cases incl. MarkerWriteFailure_Blocks, CrossRun_UnionReconcilesAll, WarnPathDoesNotDischarge, HatchStillReconcilesPendingObligation subtests, all PASS); bead -run 'MergeMetadata|GetMetadata' (TestMergeMetadata_FailClosedOnReadError, TestMergeMetadata_CleanEmptyReadStillMergesFromEmpty, TestGetMetadata subtests, all PASS). Full-package run (panel/complete/bead/cmd/mindspec) all ok, z4ps flake did not reproduce this run. go test -race on panel/complete/bead: all ok, no races reported. Blast-radius grep of MergeMetadata( callers confirms only the described classes (release.go informational, approve/*.go warn, phase/migrate.go+repair.go already-fatal, complete/* now fail-closed) — no unaccounted caller.
